message:
fix(clippy): resolve 60+ clippy warnings across workspace vendored crates

Fix clippy -D warnings in frankenterm/{base91,bidi,bintree,blob-leases,
cell,config,escape-parser,filedescriptor,input-types,luahelper,procinfo,
pty,rangeset,scripting,ssh,surface,term,termwiz,uds} and bocpd bench:

- Replace panic format strings with explicit args (Rust 2021+)
- Use std::io::Error::other() instead of Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ..)
- Fix clone_on_copy in test code with #[allow] annotations
- Replace manual RangeInclusive::contains with .contains()
- Fix loop-never-loops with if-let/while-let patterns
- Remove auto-deref, useless vec!, useless .into()
- Use std::f64::consts::{PI,E} instead of approximate values
- Fix tautological boolean expressions in tests
- Use checked_div instead of manual zero-check division
- Rename non-snake-case test function
- Apply cargo fmt to touched files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
